title: Typing timers not cancelled on normal disconnect
description: Trigger: Peer sends typing=true. Client calls disconnect() (user-initiated or network drop without auth error). _typingTimers is not cleared in disconnect() — only in the auth failure path. The 4-second Timers continue to run after disconnect, call _typingUsers.remove() and notifyListeners(). Minor: the UI will show a stale typing indicator briefly after disconnect and then have an extra rebuild. Not a crash. Fix: move the timer cancellation code from the auth failure block into disconnect() to handle both paths.
